subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-09
subcodes.first_line: Every year, on the occasion of the arrival of the New Year, the Pope would deliver a sermon in the church. One year he invited the Italian king to attend this ceremony.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی اهالی ایتالیا متعصبند وقتیکه وارد ناپولی
